div.head: The Secretary of State to the Ambassador in Colombia (Lane)
div.p: 1073. Reference is made to Embassy’s telegram 1354, August 6, 6 p.m. and subsequent telegrams concerning the Colombian Government’s approach to six other Governments regarding adherence to the United Nations Declaration.

While the Department does not wish you to take the initiative in approaching the Foreign Minister, it would be glad to receive from you such further information as may come to your attention which may indicate the latest position which appears to have been taken by each of the six governments in reply to this Colombian proposal.
